name: UNIVERSAL ENGEISHA Co., Ltd.
summary: UNIVERSAL ENGEISHA Co., Ltd., a horticultural company, engages in the rental of plants and flowers in Japan. The company rents plants to offices, hotels, restaurants, commercial spaces, showrooms, etc.; rents artificial flower arrangements; and engages in the provision of landscape, gardening, and plant maintenance services. It also provides greenery and flower gifts; artificial trees; greening systems, such as puzzle green, floral walls, miniature Japanese gardens, greenery walls and roof gardens, and wall decorations; plants for various events; flower arrangements; and garden flowerbeds and planters. In addition, the company offers LED lights and illumination displays; rents photo and aquarium, as well as various cleaning products, such as entrance mats, mops, cleaning cloths, air cleaners, futon cleaning products, etc.; and operates an online shop that provides various goods to corporate and individual assessors. Further, it provides plants, flowers, containers, soils, fertilizers, gardening goods, fresh vegetables, breads, and other products, as well as pebbles, stones, and garden furniture products through garden centers. Additionally, the company operates a flower showroom that provides creative space designs, flower displays, and other decorative goods; and garden-style caf√É¬© under the Les Grands Arbres brand name, which offers fresh meals. UNIVERSAL ENGEISHA Co., Ltd. was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Ibaraki, Japan.
